chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select case when rnk =1 then instanceid else '' end as "Instance", billingitem as "Billing_item", concat(cast(Usage as varchar),'(',UsageUnit,')')  as "Usage", fee as "Expenses",concat(cast(round(Percent,3) as varchar),'%') as "Compared_with_last_month", case when rnk = 1 then cast(round(totalFee,3) as varchar) else '' end as "Total_expenses" from(select instanceId,fee, billingitem, rank() over(partition by instanceid order by fee desc) as rnk ,sum(fee) over(partition by instanceid)  as totalFee, Usage, Percent,UsageUnit  from(select instanceid, billingitem, d1[1] as Usage, d2[1] as fee, round(d2[3]*100-100,3) as percent, UsageUnit from( select instanceid, BillingItem,compare(usage,604800) as d1, compare(fee,604800) as d2, arbitrary(UsageUnit) as UsageUnit from(  select  BillingItem,InstanceID  , sum(Usage) as Usage ,round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)  as fee, arbitrary(UsageUnit) as UsageUnit from instance_bill where productcode='ecs' and tag like '%%' group by InstanceID,BillingItem   ) group by instanceid, BillingItem)))  where Usage is not null order by totalFee desc, rnk limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select case when rnk =1 then instanceid else '' end as "Instance", billingitem as "Billing_item", concat(cast(Usage as varchar),'(',UsageUnit,')')  as "Usage", fee as "Expenses",concat(cast(round(Percent,3) as varchar),'%') as "Compared_with_last_month", case when rnk = 1 then cast(round(totalFee,3) as varchar) else '' end as "Total_expenses" from(select instanceId,fee, billingitem, rank() over(partition by instanceid order by fee desc) as rnk ,sum(fee) over(partition by instanceid)  as totalFee, Usage, Percent,UsageUnit  from(select instanceid, billingitem, d1[1] as Usage, d2[1] as fee, round(d2[3]*100-100,3) as percent, UsageUnit from( select instanceid, BillingItem,compare(usage,604800) as d1, compare(fee,604800) as d2, arbitrary(UsageUnit) as UsageUnit from(  select  BillingItem,InstanceID  , sum(Usage) as Usage ,round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)  as fee, arbitrary(UsageUnit) as UsageUnit from instance_bill where productcode='ecs' and tag like '${{Tag|%%}}' group by InstanceID,BillingItem   ) group by instanceid, BillingItem)))  where Usage is not null order by totalFee desc, rnk limit 1000

basicOptions.displayName: Instances and Expenses by Price Range

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * |  select concat('[',low, ',', coalesce(concat(top,')'),concat(low,']'))  ) as "Price_range" , counts as "Instances" from(select cast(top as varchar) as top,counts , cast( lag(top,1,0) over(order by rnk) as varchar) as low  from(select rnk,rnk-  lag(rnk,1,0) over( order by rnk) as counts, round(element_at(m,rnk+1),3) as top from(select m, sum(v) over( order by k ) as rnk  from( select m, k,v from(select map_agg(rnk, amount) as m, arbitrary(his) as his from(  select  *, row_number() over(order by amount  )  as rnk , numeric_histogram(10, amount) over() as his   from( select  InstanceId,sum(PretaxAmount) as amount from instance_bill where productcode='ecs' and tag like '%%'  group by InstanceId))),unnest(his) as t(k,v) order by k))))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * |  select concat('[',low, ',', coalesce(concat(top,')'),concat(low,']'))  ) as "Price_range" , counts as "Instances" from(select cast(top as varchar) as top,counts , cast( lag(top,1,0) over(order by rnk) as varchar) as low  from(select rnk,rnk-  lag(rnk,1,0) over( order by rnk) as counts, round(element_at(m,rnk+1),3) as top from(select m, sum(v) over( order by k ) as rnk  from( select m, k,v from(select map_agg(rnk, amount) as m, arbitrary(his) as his from(  select  *, row_number() over(order by amount  )  as rnk , numeric_histogram(10, amount) over() as his   from( select  InstanceId,sum(PretaxAmount) as amount from instance_bill where productcode='ecs' and tag like '${{Tag|%%}}'  group by InstanceId))),unnest(his) as t(k,v) order by k))))

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *  |  select concat('[',low, ',', coalesce(concat(top,')'),concat(low,']'))  ) as "Price_range" , counts as "Instances",round(total,3) as "Expenses" from(select cast(top as varchar) as top,counts , cast( lag(top,1,0) over(order by rnk) as varchar) as low ,total from(select rnk,rnk-  lag(rnk,1,0) over( order by rnk) as counts, round(element_at(m,rnk+1),3) as top,total from(select m, sum(v) over( order by k ) as rnk ,k*v as total from( select m, k,v from(select map_agg(rnk, amount) as m, arbitrary(his) as his from(  select  *, row_number() over(order by amount  )  as rnk , numeric_histogram(10, amount) over() as his   from( select  InstanceId,sum(PretaxAmount) as amount from instance_bill where productcode='ecs' and tag like '%%'  group by InstanceId))),unnest(his) as t(k,v) order by k))))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *  |  select concat('[',low, ',', coalesce(concat(top,')'),concat(low,']'))  ) as "Price_range" , counts as "Instances",round(total,3) as "Expenses" from(select cast(top as varchar) as top,counts , cast( lag(top,1,0) over(order by rnk) as varchar) as low ,total from(select rnk,rnk-  lag(rnk,1,0) over( order by rnk) as counts, round(element_at(m,rnk+1),3) as top,total from(select m, sum(v) over( order by k ) as rnk ,k*v as total from( select m, k,v from(select map_agg(rnk, amount) as m, arbitrary(his) as his from(  select  *, row_number() over(order by amount  )  as rnk , numeric_histogram(10, amount) over() as his   from( select  InstanceId,sum(PretaxAmount) as amount from instance_bill where productcode='ecs' and tag like '${{Tag|%%}}'  group by InstanceId))),unnest(his) as t(k,v) order by k))))
